summary: Added the repository changelog foundation for marketing-version release notes. CHANGELOG.md now exists with an [Unreleased] section and stable categories for user/support-facing release notes, release.md explains the changelog ownership boundary, and the bump-version fixture now matches the real changelog shape.
validations_passed: git fetch origin main && git pull --rebase origin main
missing_proof_levels: Current-cycle release notes are intentionally not backfilled in this slice; release-changelog-current-cycle-backfill owns that work.
bump-version still warns and skips if CHANGELOG.md is missing; release-changelog-required-gate owns making that a hard failure.

contract_status_changes.before: The release workflow and bump-version script referenced CHANGELOG.md, but the repository had no top-level changelog file.
contract_status_changes.after: CHANGELOG.md exists with [Unreleased] and stable release-note categories for the next MARKETING_VERSION cycle.

contract_status_changes.before: Release history existed in SecondBrain, handoffs, and queue metadata but not as curated marketing-version release notes.
contract_status_changes.after: docs/workflows/release.md defines CHANGELOG.md as curated release-note state and keeps operational history in SecondBrain/handoffs/queue metadata.

contract_status_changes.before: The bump-version test fixture used a minimal changelog with one bullet directly under [Unreleased].
contract_status_changes.after: The fixture matches the real changelog category shape while preserving existing script behavior tests.

residual_risks: CHANGELOG.md currently has placeholder headings only. release-changelog-current-cycle-backfill must curate current-cycle notes.
Tools/bump-version.sh still allows missing CHANGELOG.md by warning and continuing. release-changelog-required-gate must harden that behavior.
recommended_next_reason: The changelog foundation now exists, satisfying the entry condition for curating current-cycle [Unreleased] notes.
